case_title: SYLVIA LEW VS. SARAH GEORGE et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEW, SYLVIA AS TO DEFENDANT GEORGE, SARAH STOLTZ, MICHAEL DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEW, SYLVIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEORGE, SARAH STOLTZ, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: PARKING SPACE AT 145 RUSSIA AVENUE, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO 94112, LEASE FORFEITED
